LS 490 ), A 25 S, 2010 SR T 105(3), TG 10 AR, 2011 1 . 289 G12012 0] -- 1 of 2 -- 2 "« THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY ~ o [Parrli—Sec. 3(i)] - .~ MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS * New Delhi, the 27th January, 2012 _ - S,0. 178(E).—Whereas in pursuance of the Order dated the 7th January, 1998 of the Hon’ble Supreme Court i Writ Petition (C) No. 13029 of 1985, the Central Government had constitutéd the Environment Pollution (Prevention and - Control) Authority (EPCA) vide Notification Number $.0. 93 (E), dated the 20th January, 1998; And whereas the said Agthority was constituted with the objective of protecting and improving the quality of the environment and preventing and controlling envirotimental pollution in the National | Capital Region; And whereas the said Authority is assisting the Hon’ble Supreme Court in various eilvirmmem related matters in the National Capital Region in terms of the above referred notification; And whereas the tenure éf_the said Authority was exterided from time to time by the Central Government and lastly it was extended on the 19th day of January, 2011; And whereas the Ceniral Govemment considers it necessary to extend the tenure of the said Authority for a further period of one year so that the Authority is able to address those important issues relating to pollution in the National Capital Region;_ . . . ; Now, t}mfn_le, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of Section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendment in the Order of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.0. 93(E), dated the 29th January, 1998, namely:— . : In the said Order, in paragraph 1, for the words “for a period of fourteen years”, the words “for a period of fifteen years” shall be substituted. N . [F: No. Q- 18011/13/2000-CPA] : . RAJIV GAUBA, It Secy. Foot Note—The principal order was published in the Gazette of India vide No. .0, 93(E), dated the 29th January, 1998 and - subscquently amended vide No..5.0. 68(E), datod the 25th January, 2000, No. 8.0. 108(E), dated the 25th January, 2002, No. S.0. 99(E), dated the 28th January, 2003, No. 5.0. 396(E), dated the 3rd April, 2003, No. 5.0.94(E), dated the 25th January, 2006, No. $.0. 1207(E), dated the 27h July; 2006, No. $.0. 67%(E), dated the 27th April, 2007, No. S.0. 1219(E), dated the 26th July, 2007, No. $.0. 1720 (E), dated the i 8th July, 2008, No.S.0. 1839(E), dated the 2 7th July, 2009; No. S.0. 190(E), dated the 25th.
